title: FIRST DAY AT FAIRLEIGH DICKINSON UNIVERSITY | VANCOUVER | INDIAN STUDENT
body: Esteemed advisor, I find myself contemplating the decision between Northeastern University's Master of Professional Studies in Informatics with a focus on Information Security Management and Fairleigh Dickinson University's Master of Science in Applied Computer Science, specializing in Advanced Computer Programming. Both institutions have scheduled these programs to commence in January 2025. I humbly request your esteemed counsel in guiding me toward the academic path that aligns most optimally with my intellectual and professional objectives.
author: @Wya4t

title: Why..? Fairleigh Dickinson University Vancouver | Study Abroad Visa
body: Hii sir ..i applied for fdu in MAS program....for sep 22 ...file lodged on 12june ..bio on 16 done......the issue is i got a email in july in which they denied to give defferment...bcoz they changed some requirements ...so the one time deffer option not available for sep intake students
author: @drphysio11

title: Why..? Fairleigh Dickinson University Vancouver | Study Abroad Visa
body: I've been approved for Canada Study Visa on this university and there's no  Diploma or PG diploma courses in FDU. So stop spreading false information ! Please !
author: @sandeepsinghbrar7046

title: FDU’s Metropolitan Campus Tour
body: Orgullosa de ver a mi hija muy feliz mente egresado de esta prestigiada institución DALI RAMOS RAMOS y orgullosa de ser MEXICANA
author: @guadaluperamos6174

title: FDU’s Metropolitan Campus Tour
body:
Wow! Except for Wilshire Apartments being replaced by the Northpointe residence, this place hasn't changed in more than 40 years! Loved being an RA and Head
Resident in Linden and the Courts. It still looks like a really happy place with a lot of resources. Well done in March Madness, Knights.
author: @allieanddansmom3830

title: Terrence Brown: "My Turn" Episode 1 - Day in the Life with Fairleigh Dickinson's Newest Commit
body: 15 Seconds in: proud of this young man. He was a DAWG at Heights. Hope he kills it at the next level.
